intent-to-aura.title: Cellular Bio-Electricity: From Intent to Aura

content.text: The <Term id='coherence'>quantum coherence</Term> observed in biological systems suggests a level of precision that transcends classical thermodynamics. This phenomenon, often termed <Term id='biophotons'>biophoton emission</Term>, is not merely a byproduct of metabolic activity but a fundamental communication channel within the <Term id='microtubules'>microtubules</Term> of living cells.

As we delve deeper into the <Term id='bio-resonant-fields'>bio-resonant fields</Term>, we observe that the resonance patterns align with specific harmonic frequencies that regulate cellular growth. The interaction between these fields and external <Term id='electromagnetic-induction'>electromagnetic induction</Term> creates a complex dance of energy transfer.

The <Term id='neural-nebula'>neural nebula</Term> serves as the primary interface for this energy. By mapping the axonal pathways, researchers have identified nodes of high-intensity luminescence that correspond to peak cognitive performance.
